secure_scan.dpi_dialog_content: You have not subscribed to DPI service. Please subscribe first to enable this feature.
secure_scan.scanning_desc: Please wait while we evaluate your security settings.
secure_scan.scan_complete_desc: Your router security has been evaluated.
secure_scan.confirm_disable_content: Are you sure you want to disable {name}?
secure_scan.wifi_security_desc: Current WiFi Config is unsafe please check the password and encryption
secure_scan.dmz_desc: DMZ is enabled, host is exposed to the internet
secure_scan.wan_ssh_desc: Remote SSH is enabled, may lead to remote access vulnerability
secure_scan.wan_https_desc: Web management is exposed, may allow unauthorized access
secure_scan.wan_ping_desc: WAN ping response is enabled, vulnerable to ICMP attacks
secure_scan.port_forward_desc: Port forwarding rules are configured, may cause potential exposure
secure_scan.acl_wan_desc: ACL wan control is enabled, may allow unauthorized access
secure_scan.wan_open_ports_desc: Some ports are open to WAN, potential attack surface
secure_scan.samba_wan_desc: Samba Wan access is enabled, file sharing is exposed
secure_scan.webdav_wan_desc: WebDav Wan access is enabled, file access is exposed
secure_scan.dpi_desc: Suggest to enable DPI content protection
secure_scan.ddns_desc: DDNS is enabled, domain information may be exposed
secure_scan.vpn_killswitch_desc: Kill switch is disabled, VPN leaks may occur when connection drops
secure_scan.firmware_desc: Update available from {now_version} to {new_version} with security fixes. Please update immediately.
secure_scan.admin_password_desc: Current password is weak, suggest to change to a strong one
secure_scan.upnp_desc: UPnP is enabled, may automatically open firewall ports to external networks
secure_scan.no_match_safety_criteria: No items matched the safety criteria. Fix detected risks to improve your results.
secure_scan.excellent_security_desc: Your network is fully protected with no risks detected. Keep up the good practices.
